creator: rdm@cfcl.com
text:
The man page says that "Each line has five mandatory fields and four
optional fields, with a whitespace separating each field."  This should
be changed to read "...with whitespace..."; multiple whitespace
characters may be used between fields, if desired.

Also, it is not clear that the use of a size and a time together will
not fire if just the size criterion is met.  So, if you want to trim
the maillog at midnight OR if it reaches 5000 KB, you need two entries.
Somehow, this needs to be clarified.

How-To-Repeat: man newsyslog
